rawFiles.name: wikidata-border-crossing-discovery-2026-07-08.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against border crossing and border checkpoint items in a Syria-region coordinate box in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Query Wikidata for border crossing and border checkpoint items in a Syria-region coordinate box.
Accept only exact public border-crossing matches to existing canonical records where the item label, coordinates, country relationship, and aliases are compatible.
Add Wikidata identifiers, Arabic labels, aliases, and dated source references to accepted existing records.
Hold unlabeled, generic-numbered, neighboring-side-only, bridge-only, military, or coordinate-disagreeing items for maintainer review.
Keep operational status unknown and do not import live crossing status, route availability, or checkpoint operations.
reviewNotes: Imported Wikidata identifiers for 2 existing public border crossing records: Bab al-Hawa Border Crossing (Q1528463) and Peshakapor/Semalka Border Crossing (Q60572805). Held exact-near but neighboring-side items such as Al-Qa'im (Q17511359), al-Waleed (Q20422533), Mursitpinar (Q61073828), Rabia/Fishkhabour (Q112039675 and Q115590232), Masnaa (Q6783485), and Cobanbey (Q130382086) because the canonical records prefer Syrian-side identity while these items describe the counterpart side or require a cross-border facility modeling decision. Held unlabeled or generic-numbered checkpoint items, including Q119797216, Q20423683, Q25382079, and multiple Q68036xxx rows, because they lack stable public names or describe checkpoint/bridge geometries rather than canonical border-crossing records. Held al-Tanaf (Q115630553) because its point is about 7.8 km from the existing HIU/HDX reference point and needs independent review.
